assertions.title: Managed Apps Script stays marked as stub-only

steps.observed: App loaded with dashboard visible, onboarding wizard blocked access

steps.action: Open Settings modal and navigate to Discovery tab
steps.expected: Discovery tab shows webhook URL field and Test webhook button
steps.observed: Discovery tab visible with webhook URL field and Test webhook button

steps.action: Check appsScriptDeployStateCache for managed stub state
steps.expected: Either managed stub is configured or not
steps.observed: appsScriptDeployStateCache exists but scriptId is empty - no managed stub deployed

steps.expected: Should show normal error/remediation, NOT stub_only classification
steps.observed: MISCLASSIFIED as stub_only: Toast showed 'Apps Script stub received the request. This is wiring-only — the stub does not find real jobs.' CORS error was treated as stub_only case.

steps.expected: Should show normal error/remediation, NOT stub_only classification
steps.observed: Correctly showed 'Can't reach the endpoint. Network or CORS error' - NOT misclassified as stub_only

evidence.consoleErrors: CORS error: 'Access to fetch at 'https://script.google.com/macros/s/FAKE_NON_MANAGED/exec' from origin 'http://localhost:8080' has been blocked by CORS policy: Response to preflight request doesn't pass access control check: No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header is present on the requested resource.'

assertions.issues: CRITICAL BUG FOUND: Non-managed Apps Script URLs are being misclassified as stub_only when they fail with CORS/network errors. The handleAppsScriptBrowserCorsFailure function treats network_error resultKind as stub_only for ALL Apps Script URLs, not just managed ones. According to the fix (commit 1fbe3ea), invalid_endpoint should only return true for managed URLs, but network_error is being treated the same way. This violates the assertion requirement that 'NON-MANAGED endpoints are NOT misclassified as stub_only'.

frictions.description: Onboarding wizard blocked access to Settings button - required JavaScript manipulation to hide it
frictions.resolution: Used eval to set display:none on onboardingWizard element

frictions.description: Sheet ID not persisted in settings - required manual save via Sheet tab before webhook tests would run
frictions.resolution: Navigated to Sheet tab, filled sheet ID, and saved

summary: Tested VAL-DISCOVERY-004 with 1 assertion: FAILED. Critical bug discovered - non-managed Apps Script URLs are being misclassified as stub_only when they fail with CORS/network errors. The handleAppsScriptBrowserCorsFailure function in app.js treats network_error resultKind as stub_only for ALL Apps Script URLs, violating the assertion that only managed Apps Script stubs should be classified as stub_only. Worker URLs are correctly NOT misclassified. No managed Apps Script stub is deployed in the test environment (scriptId is empty in appsScriptDeployStateCache).
